extends.description: Level fragments only (~/.agent-sandbox/profiles/*.toml): name of the parent fragment to deep-merge on top of

extra_rw.description: Extra directories with read-write access besides the project

auto_expose_path.description: Auto-detect $PATH entries under $HOME and expose them read-only

home_ro_dirs.description: Extra home subdirectories to expose read-only (relative to $HOME)

default_provider.description: Provider used when -P / --provider is not given; empty = none

default_profile.description: LEGACY alias of default_provider (pre-#81); run migrate-providers

security.description: Isolation knobs (levels paranoid/normal/permissive preset these via the shipped fragments).

new_session.description: New terminal session (anti terminal-escape; may interfere with Ctrl+C)

block_git_push.description: Block git push via a PATH wrapper

credential_proxy.description: Inject API keys on the host side — keys never enter the sandbox env

unshare_net.description: Kernel network-namespace isolation (paranoid); egress only via the proxy bridge

allow_domains.description: Extra hosts the credential proxy forwards to (paranoid allowlist)

landlock.description: Landlock hardening layer (#222): kernel fence mirroring the bwrap mounts; false = explicit opt-out (paranoid may then degrade)

allow_connect_ports.description: Extra TCP ports the agent may connect to (Landlock CONNECT_TCP rules)

allow_bind_ports.description: TCP ports the agent may bind (Landlock BIND_TCP rules — local dev servers)

blocked_hosts.description: Extra hosts to block (cloud metadata endpoints are always blocked)

strip_sections.description: Regex patterns for .gitconfig section headers to strip

overrides.description: Values forced in the sanitized gitconfig (dot-notation keys)

env.description: Environment crossing into the sandbox (clearenv + whitelist model).

passthrough.description: Host env vars passed through (TERM, ZELLIJ, LINCE_AGENT_ID, ...)

extra.description: Extra env vars set inside the sandbox ($VAR values expand against the host env)

auto_project.description: Snapshot the project dir before each run

auto_config.description: Snapshot the agent config dir before each run

claude.description: Claude-specific knobs (legacy section; prefer [agents.claude] for agent overrides).

config_dir.description: Sandbox-isolated copy of the Claude config directory

use_real_config.description: Mount the real ~/.claude directly (skips the isolated copy; disables diff/merge)

additionalProperties.description: A provider: named env-var bundle switching model provider/account (anthropic, vertex, zai, ...).

description.description: Human-readable label shown by the wizard

env.description: Env vars set when this provider is active ($VAR values expand against the host env)

env_unset.description: Env vars explicitly unset when active

default_args.description: Override the agent default_args when active

providers.description: Top-level providers (attributed to claude); prefer the namespaced [<agent>.providers.<name>] form

additionalProperties.description: A provider: named env-var bundle switching model provider/account (anthropic, vertex, zai, ...).

description.description: Human-readable label shown by the wizard

env.description: Env vars set when this provider is active ($VAR values expand against the host env)

env_unset.description: Env vars explicitly unset when active

default_args.description: Override the agent default_args when active

agents.description: Per-agent overrides of the registry defaults (command, default_args, env, home_ro_dirs, home_rw_dirs, bwrap_conflict, disable_inner_sandbox_args, scratch_*)
